minimum_req: Desktop computer (e.g. optimized for wider screens)
Mobile phone (e.g. works on small screens; use the camera)
input_data_formats: Widely used file formats (CSV, JSON, XML, etc.)
output_data_formats: Static content (e.g. reports on website pages, tables and graphs in the tool's interface, PDF files)
name: SyntroPedia
description:
A comprehensive plant encyclopedia for Syntropic Agroforestry. Our global guide provides the data-driven bridge to help you design, manage, and scale abundance in any ecosystem.

SyntroPedia is a practitioner-to-practitioner tool designed for the field. Built to be fully interactive, it empowers users to contribute new plant data directly from the ground. It’s not just an app; it's a growing, crowd-sourced ecosystem where farmers and experts share real-time knowledge to advance syntropic farming together.
software_proglanguage_other: The mobile application is implemented in Flutter using the Dart programming language developed by Google. The backend APIs are built using Laravel.
input_data_file_formats_other: The tool accepts JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, and other OS-recognized image formats. But It converts uploads to JPEG internally.
access_procedure: To gain full access, users must register beforehand with the F4F Academy - https://academy.forests4farming.org
listed_other_databases_list: The application is listed in App store and Play store.
integrated_other_tools_list: It collects information about whether the user is registered on the academy or not.
feedback_tool_info: SyntroPedia is a practitioner-to-practitioner tool designed for the field. Built to be fully interactive, it empowers users to contribute new plant data directly from the ground. It’s not just an app; it's a growing, crowd-sourced ecosystem where farmers and experts share real-time knowledge to advance syntropic farming together.
